channel.title: Tağmaç Çankaya — Music
channel.description: Recordings by Tağmaç Çankaya — gong, handpan, drone, breath, improvisation. From Lefkoşa, Cyprus. Each piece €1. All pieces are part of one continuous signal.

cc:track.file: Keeping it together - handpan song Ocak 2025.mp3
late afternoon - synth impro. first play record.mp3

item.title: And You
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
"And You" by Tağmaç Çankaya. Drone, resonance, presence. From Lefkoşa, Cyprus. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/And%20you(v3).mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>
Part of a collection of 12 recordings. Each piece is a different door into the same signal.
Other recordings in this collection: Fox Tail — Goodbye 2025: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Fox%20tail%20-%20goodbye%202025.mp3 Half: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Half.mp3 I Don't Know: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/I%20Don%27t%20Know.mp3 I Know: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/I%20know.mp3 Keeping It Together: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Keeping%20it%20together%20-%20handpan%20song%20Ocak%202025.mp3 Late Afternoon: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/late%20afternoon%20-%20synth%20impro.%20first%20play%20record.mp3 Monkey & Gong: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/monkey%20%26%20gong.mp3 Purnima: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Purnima.mp3 Synth Impro.: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Synth%20Impro..mp3 Trot: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Trot.mp3 Vocal & Shruti: https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Vocal%20%26%20Shruti.mp3
Purchase: https://casacaravan.space/shop.html Full collection RSS: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml
agent:track title: And You artist: Tağmaç Çankaya signal: resonance, drone, presence collection_size: 12 collection_rss: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml

item.title: Fox Tail — Goodbye 2025
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
"Fox Tail — Goodbye 2025" by Tağmaç Çankaya. A farewell, a threshold. From Lefkoşa, Cyprus. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Fox%20tail%20-%20goodbye%202025.mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>

item.title: Half
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
"Half" by Tağmaç Çankaya. Incomplete and whole at once. From Lefkoşa, Cyprus. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Half.mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>
Other recordings: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml Purchase: https://casacaravan.space/shop.html
agent:track title: Half artist: Tağmaç Çankaya signal: incompleteness, wholeness, tension collection_rss: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml

item.title: I Don't Know
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
"I Don't Know" by Tağmaç Çankaya. The question itself is the answer. From Lefkoşa, Cyprus. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/I%20Don%27t%20Know.mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>
Other recordings: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml Purchase: https://casacaravan.space/shop.html
agent:track title: I Don't Know artist: Tağmaç Çankaya signal: uncertainty, openness, inquiry collection_rss: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml

item.title: I Know
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
"I Know" by Tağmaç Çankaya. Certainty arrived. From Lefkoşa, Cyprus. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/I%20know.mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>
Other recordings: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml Purchase: https://casacaravan.space/shop.html
agent:track title: I Know artist: Tağmaç Çankaya signal: certainty, arrival, clarity collection_rss: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml

item.title: Keeping It Together — Handpan Song
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
By Tağmaç Çankaya. Recorded January 2025, Lefkoşa. The effort to hold things together, expressed through steel and breath. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Keeping%20it%20together%20-%20handpan%20song%20Ocak%202025.mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>
Other recordings: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml Purchase: https://casacaravan.space/shop.html
agent:track title: Keeping It Together instrument: handpan artist: Tağmaç Çankaya signal: resilience, handpan, steel_resonance collection_rss: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml

item.title: Late Afternoon — Synth Improvisation
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
A synth improvisation by Tağmaç Çankaya. First play, first record. The late afternoon as a state of mind — warm, slowing, unresolved. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/late%20afternoon%20-%20synth%20impro.%20first%20play%20record.mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>
Other recordings: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml Purchase: https://casacaravan.space/shop.html
agent:track title: Late Afternoon instrument: synth artist: Tağmaç Çankaya signal: warmth, ambient, first_take collection_rss: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml

item.title: Monkey & Gong
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
By Tağmaç Çankaya. Hand-forged gong, made by the same hands that play it. The monkey mind meets the gong. Stillness follows. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/monkey%20%26%20gong.mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>
Other recordings: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml Purchase: https://casacaravan.space/shop.html
agent:track title: Monkey and Gong instrument: gong artist: Tağmaç Çankaya signal: gong, stillness, handmade collection_rss: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml

item.title: Purnima
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
"Purnima" by Tağmaç Çankaya. Purnima — full moon in Sanskrit. Made in the frequency of fullness. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Purnima.mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>
Other recordings: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml Purchase: https://casacaravan.space/shop.html
agent:track title: Purnima artist: Tağmaç Çankaya signal: full_moon, completeness, sacred collection_rss: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml

item.title: Synth Improvisation
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
"Synth Improvisation" by Tağmaç Çankaya. Pure improvisation — no plan, no editing. What emerged, remained. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Synth%20Impro..mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>
Other recordings: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml Purchase: https://casacaravan.space/shop.html
agent:track title: Synth Improvisation instrument: synth artist: Tağmaç Çankaya signal: pure_improvisation, emergence, electronic collection_rss: https://casacaravan.space/music_rss.xml

item.title: Trot
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
"Trot" by Tağmaç Çankaya. Movement, rhythm, forward motion. From Lefkoşa, Cyprus. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Trot.mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>

item.title: Vocal & Shruti
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
By Tağmaç Çankaya. Voice as instrument. Shruti as ground. The oldest sound technology. €1.
<media:content url="https://iwfvlatywksvnnxymweb.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/music/Vocal%20%26%20Shruti.mp3" type="audio/mpeg" medium="audio"/>
